R1: precedence(tree, 'assess individual risk', 'receive customer data')
R2: activity_sends(tree, 'provide brochures', 'wphgCustomerInformation') and activity_sends(tree, 'provide brochures', 'basicInformationSecuritiesCapitalInvestment')
R3: leads_to(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'send customer legitimation and account documents') and executed_by(tree, 'send customer legitimation and account documents', 'market support')
R4: executed_by(tree, 'conduct investment advice', 'customer advisor') and condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'securitiesCompetence < "C"', 'terminate', scope='global')
R5: executed_by(tree, 'identify and legitimate customer', 'customer advisor') and executed_by(tree, 'check money laundering suspicion', 'anti-money-laundering officer')
R6: leads_to(tree, 'resolve money laundering suspicion', 'conclude custody account contract') and precedence(tree, 'conclude custody account contract', 'resolve money laundering suspicion')
R7: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'customerContact == true', 'update customer information', scope='global')
